en.name: Huarong Pass
en.description: Huarong Pass (华容道) is one of China's most celebrated sliding block puzzles with a legendary historical theme! Help the warlord Cao Cao escape through the Huarong Pass by sliding blocks strategically. The large 2×2 block represents Cao Cao, while smaller blocks represent generals blocking his path. With a rich history dating back to ancient China, this puzzle challenges your strategic thinking and spatial reasoning!
en.objectives: Slide the blocks to create a path for Cao Cao (the large 2×2 red block) to exit through the bottom center opening. Plan your moves carefully—this classic puzzle requires a minimum of 81 moves to solve!
en.howToPlay: Click a block to select it, then use Arrow Keys to slide it into empty spaces. Only 曹操 (the red 2x2 block) can exit through the bottom center. Plan your moves carefully!

rules.controls: Click on a block to select it, then use arrow keys to slide it into adjacent empty spaces. Only horizontal and vertical movements are allowed. Blocks cannot overlap.
mechanics: Cao Cao is the 2×2 block that must escape
Two empty spaces allow block movement
Only Cao Cao can exit through the bottom center
features: Historical Theme - Based on Romance of Three Kingdoms

tips: Clear a path for 曹操 to reach the exit
Vertical blocks are the most challenging to move
Sometimes you need to move blocks away then back
The classic puzzle requires 81+ moves to solve

faq.question: What's the story behind this puzzle?
faq.answer: Based on the Romance of Three Kingdoms, Cao Cao was trapped at Huarong Pass after losing the Battle of Red Cliffs. The puzzle recreates his escape attempt!

faq.question: What's the minimum number of moves?
faq.answer: The classic starting position requires exactly 81 moves minimum. Finding this optimal solution is extremely challenging!

faq.question: Why are vertical blocks harder to move?
faq.answer: Vertical 1×2 blocks have limited movement options in a narrow board. They often create bottlenecks that require careful planning to navigate around.

faq.question: Is there only one solution?
faq.answer: No, there are many ways to solve the puzzle, but only one optimal 81-move solution. Most first attempts take 100+ moves.

zh.name: 华容道
zh.description: 华容道是中国最著名的滑块谜题之一，拥有传奇的历史主题！通过战略性地滑动方块帮助曹操通过华容道逃脱。大的2×2方块代表曹操，较小的方块代表阻挡他道路的将军们。这个谜题拥有追溯到古代中国的丰富历史，挑战你的战略思维和空间推理！
zh.objectives: 滑动方块为曹操（大的2×2红色方块）创造一条通过底部中央出口的路径。仔细规划你的移动——这个经典谜题至少需要81步才能解决！
zh.howToPlay: 点击方块选中它，然后使用方向键滑入空位。只有曹操（红色2x2方块）可以从底部中央出口离开。仔细规划你的移动！

rules.controls: 点击方块选中它，然后使用方向键将其滑入相邻的空位。只允许水平和垂直移动。方块不能重叠。
mechanics: 曹操是必须逃脱的2×2方块
将军是1×2方块（垂直或水平）
两个空位允许方块移动
只有曹操可以从底部中央出口
features: 经典布局 - 传统起始位置
移动计数器 - 追踪你的效率
历史主题 - 基于三国演义
撤销系统 - 撤回移动

tips: 为曹操清理一条通往出口的路径
竖直方块是最难移动的
有时需要先移开方块再移回来

faq.question: 这个谜题背后有什么故事？
faq.answer: 基于三国演义，曹操在赤壁之战失败后被困在华容道。这个谜题重现了他的逃脱尝试！

faq.question: 最少需要多少步？
faq.answer: 经典起始位置恰好需要最少81步。找到这个最优解极其具有挑战性！

faq.question: 为什么竖直方块更难移动？
faq.answer: 竖直1×2方块在狭窄的棋盘上移动选项有限。它们经常创造需要仔细规划才能绕过的瓶颈。

faq.question: 只有一个解决方案吗？
faq.answer: 不，有很多方法可以解决这个谜题，但只有一个最优的81步解决方案。大多数首次尝试需要100+步。
